label: Private Neglect
description: Composite measure of failure to maintain private property (from 311 requests)

label: Public Denigration
description: Composite measure of manmade incivilities in public spaces (e.g. graffiti)

label: Civic Engagement
description: Tendency for residents to know of and use the 311 system

label: Custodianship
description: Tendency to use 311 to report and maintain public spaces

label: Crime
description: Ecometric index of criminal activity derived from 911 dispatches

label: Social Disorder
description: Ecometric index of social disorder from 911 dispatches

label: Medical Emergency
description: Ecometric index of medical emergencies from 911 dispatches

label: Investment
description: Measure of construction investment from building permit applications

label: Growth
description: Measure of new development and growth from permits

label: Commercial Permits
description: Count of commercial building permits

label: Residential Permits
description: Count of residential building permits

label: Ecometric Environment Score (Residential)
description: Composite ecometric score for residential property environment at the tract level

label: Land Value per Sq Ft (Residential)
description: Average assessed land value per square foot for residential properties

label: Land Value per Sq Ft (Non-Residential)
description: Average assessed land value per square foot for non-residential properties

label: Building Value per Sq Ft (Residential)
description: Average assessed building value per square foot for residential properties

label: Building Value per Sq Ft (Non-Residential)
description: Average assessed building value per square foot for non-residential properties

label: Year Built/Remodeled (Residential)
description: Average year residential properties were built or last remodeled

label: Year Built/Remodeled (Non-Residential)
description: Average year non-residential properties were built or last remodeled

label: Decade Built/Remodeled (Residential)
description: Modal decade in which residential properties were built or last remodeled

label: Decade Built/Remodeled (Non-Residential)
description: Modal decade in which non-residential properties were built or last remodeled

label: Neighborhood Property Value Index
description: Composite index of aggregate property value for the census tract

label: Listing Frequency
description: Count/density of Airbnb listings per census tract

label: Average Price
description: Average nightly price of Airbnb listings per tract

label: Occupancy Rate
description: Average occupancy rate of Airbnb listings

label: Listing Frequency
description: Count of Craigslist housing listings per tract

label: Average Value
description: Average listing value per tract

label: Average Rent
description: Average rent price from Craigslist listings

label: Review Frequency
description: Frequency of Yelp reviews per tract

label: Average Rating
description: Average Yelp rating for businesses in tract

label: Restaurant Density
description: Number of restaurants per unit area
